title: Dekton 5LB Magnetic Pick Up Tool - Ergonomic Anti-Slip Handle, Telescopic to 620mm+, Heavy Duty Magnetic Head for Easy Retrieval of Metal Objects in Tight Spaces and Hard-to-Reach Areas
features: Powerful Magnetic Retrieval: The Dekton 5LB Magnetic Pick Up Tool features a strong magnetic head capable of lifting up to 5 pounds, making it ideal for retrieving dropped screws, bolts, and other metal objects in tight spaces. Perfect for mechanics, contractors, and DIY enthusiasts alike.

Telescopic Design: This tool extends from a compact size to over 620mm, allowing you to reach and retrieve items from hard-to-access areas without straining or bending. Its adjustable length ensures versatility for various tasks, whether you're working under a car or behind appliances.

Ergonomic Anti-Slip Handle: Designed for comfort, the ergonomic handle provides a secure grip even in challenging conditions. The anti-slip surface ensures you maintain control during use, preventing accidental drops and enhancing your overall experience.

Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, the Dekton Magnetic Pick Up Tool is built to last. Its heavy-duty design withstands the rigors of daily use in both professional and home settings, ensuring reliability whenever you need it.

Lightweight and Portable: Weighing in at just a few ounces, this pick-up tool is easy to carry and store. Its lightweight design makes it a convenient addition to any toolbox, ensuring you're always prepared for unexpected retrieval tasks.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide.
